data.title: Manycore Tech Debuts on HKEX as the World's First Spatial Intelligence Company
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Manycore Tech Inc. was officially listed on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the stock code 00068.HK. This makes Manycore Tech the world's first publicly traded company specializing in spatial intelligence.

data.title: Borregaard ASA: Shares traded ex-dividend today
data.description: Starting today, April 17, 2026, shares in Borregaard ASA will be traded without the entitlement to a dividend of NOK 4.75 per share.

data.title: Banqup Group's 2025 Annual Report
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in La Hulpe, Belgium, Banqup Group SA, a prominent European company offering comprehensive financial workflow management solutions, released its annual report for the year 2025.

data.title: Dividend Payments ex-date of Coop Pank AS
data.description: In the year 2025, Coop Pank AS will be paying a dividend of 6.5 eurocents per share to its shareholders. The list of eligible shareholders for the dividend will be finalized on 22.04.2026 COB in the settlement system. The ex-date, marking the day when rights related to the shares change, is set for 21.04.2026. Starting from this date, individuals acquiring shares will not be entitled to receive the dividend for the 2025 financial year. The dividend will be distributed to shareholders on 27.04.2026.

data.title: World Hemophilia Day 2026 - April 17, 2026 - "Diagnosis: First step to care."
data.description: Today, April 17, 2026, marks World Hemophilia Day, when the worldwide community affected by inherited bleeding disorders unites to raise awareness. The theme for this year, "Diagnosis: First step to care," underscores the crucial role of early identification in managing these disorders. This annual event serves as a platform for advocacy, with the global community emphasizing the need for improved care and support for those with inherited bleeding disorders.
